recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: My Father's Violin
recommendations.overview: Through their shared grief and connection to music, an orphaned girl bonds with her emotionally aloof, successful violinist uncle.

recommendations.title: Metal: A Headbanger's Journey
recommendations.overview: The film discusses the traits and originators of some of metal's many subgenres, including the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, power metal, Nu metal, glam metal, thrash metal, black metal, and death metal. Dunn uses a family-tree-type flowchart to d
recommendations.director: Jessica Joy Wise, Scot McFadyen, Sam Dunn

recommendations.title: Beyond the Universe
recommendations.overview: While waiting for a kidney transplant, a young pianist finds an unexpected connection with her doctor — and the courage to fulfill her musical dreams.

recommendations.title: Heavy Trip
recommendations.overview: Turo is stuck in a small village and the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. He and his bandmates have practiced for 12 years without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from

recommendations.title: Hounddog
recommendations.overview: A drama set in the American South, where a precocious, troubled girl finds a safe haven in the music and movement of Elvis Presley.

recommendations.title: Metal Lords
recommendations.overview: For teenage misfits Hunter and Kevin, the path to glory is clear: Devote themselves to metal. Win Battle of the Bands. And be worshipped like gods.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Four Minutes
recommendations.overview: Jenny is young. Her life is over. She killed someone. And she would do it again. When an 80-year-old piano teacher discovers the girl’s secret, her brutality and her dreams, she decides to transform her pupil into the musical wunderkind she once was.

recommendations.title: The Anthem of the Heart
recommendations.overview: A young girl had her voice magically taken away so that she would never hurt people with it, but her outlook changes when she encounters music and friendship. Will Naruse be able to convey the anthem of her heart?
